title: Calamagrostis heterophylla
intro: Calamagrostis heterophylla, also known as Japanese feather-reed grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Calamagrostis heterophylla include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In herbal medicine, Calamagrostis heterophylla is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to treat respiratory issues, or as a decoction to alleviate fever and inflammation.
